headline: Broadcom’s OCI Push Puts AI Data Center Role In Focus
summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) has introduced a 400G/lane optical DSP and is leading the new Optical Compute Interconnect, or OCI, open standard alongside AMD, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, and OpenAI. The company is also working with JetCool and Flex to bring production-ready liquid cooling solutions into AI data center deployments. These developments aim to support hyperscalable AI clusters with multivendor optical connectivity and advanced thermal management. Broadcom is widely known for its...

headline: Broadcom (AVGO) Introduces VMware Telco Cloud Platform 9 to Support 5G, AI Workloads
summary: Broadcom Inc. (NASDAQ:AVGO) is one of the best get-rich-quick stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On March 2, Broadcom introduced VMware Telco Cloud Platform 9, a unified private cloud infrastructure designed to enhance hardware efficiency and reduce costs for telecommunications operators. headline: NVIDIA Joins OCI To Shape Optical Links And AI Data Center Future
summary: NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) has co founded the Optical Compute Interconnect (OCI) Multi Source Agreement to define open standards for optical links in AI data centers. The consortium includes AMD, Broadcom, Meta, Microsoft, and OpenAI, aiming to create interoperable, high density optical interconnects. The group intends to address copper connectivity bottlenecks and support much larger AI clusters for future workloads. NVIDIA enters this effort with a strong market profile and a current share...
